name: Reason Codes (Master)
description: System-wide reason codes for shop-floor events: Scrap / Rework / Downtime / Hold / Other. Loaded as CompanyId IS NULL rows in the ReasonCodes table. Tenants extend by adding their own rows with CompanyId set.

values.description: Material defect — incoming raw material out of spec
Operator error — wrong setup, wrong feed, mis-pick
Setup error — first-piece out of tolerance
Equipment failure — tool break, fixture slip, axis drift
Program / NC defect — toolpath or offset wrong
Dimensional out-of-spec — needs re-machining
Surface finish below spec — needs polish / re-finish
Cosmetic defect — scratch / mark / discoloration
Assembly defect — needs disassembly / rework
Planned setup — machine being set up for next job
Preventive maintenance — scheduled PM activity
Unplanned breakdown — machine down for repair
Waiting on material — material not at machine
Waiting on tooling — tool not available or broken
Waiting on program / NC file
Waiting on inspection / quality release
Operator break / shift change
Meeting / training / shift huddle
Waiting on customer — confirmation / spec change / hold instruction
Waiting on material — incoming PO not received
NCR open — non-conformance under review
Engineering review — drawing or spec being revised
Credit hold — customer financial
Quality hold — pending inspection / disposition
Capacity hold — work center over capacity
Other — operator to add note in detail field
